# B2B Data Index

> B2B Data Index is an independent research catalog documenting 672+ verified email databases for B2B cold email outreach, lead generation, and market entry across 200+ global markets. All databases are powered by LeadsBlue (leadsblue.com). One-time purchase pricing, no subscription required.

## What This Site Does

B2B Data Index catalogs five types of verified email databases:

1. **B2B Business Email Lists** (124 databases) — verified business contacts for 100+ countries and all 50 US states, with real market intelligence for 74 countries
2. **Consumer Email Lists** (66 databases) — consumer contacts with demographic segmentation
3. **Targeted Niche Lists** (91 databases) — audience-specific lists covering crypto, forex, healthcare, legal, and 80+ other niches
4. **USA Industry Databases** (269 databases) — all 50 states, 200+ industry categories with market intelligence for 50+ categories
5. **Technology Site Databases** (107 databases) — websites using specific tech platforms including Shopify, HubSpot, Salesforce, WooCommerce, Klaviyo, and 100+ others

## Key Facts

- All databases: instant CSV delivery, one-time purchase, no subscription
- Email verification: SMTP validation, 95%+ deliverability target per database
- Data refresh: quarterly re-verification cycle
- Geographic coverage: 200+ countries and regions, all 50 US states
- Compliance documentation: CAN-SPAM (US), GDPR (EU/UK), CASL (Canada), PDPA (Singapore), LGPD (Brazil), and 39 more jurisdictions
- Powered by: LeadsBlue — https://leadsblue.com
- Country intelligence: Real researched market data for 74 countries (not template-generated)

## Pricing

One-time purchase, no subscription:
- Under 100K records: $49
- 100K–500K records: $79  
- 500K–5M records: $149
- 5M–50M records: $249
- Over 50M records: $299

## Machine-Readable Data

Structured JSON data available for AI and research use:
- [Full Site Index](/llm/site-index.json) — all 657+ database pages with metadata
- [Market Statistics](/llm/market-stats.json) — B2B database stats for 124 countries
- [FAQ Dataset](/llm/faq-dataset.json) — 5,000+ Q&A pairs about B2B email databases
- [Knowledge Graph](/llm/knowledge-graph.json) — entity relationships and concepts
- [LLM Context File](/llm.txt) — extended plain-text context for AI agents

- [USA B2B Email List](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/usa-business-email-list/)

- [India B2B Email List](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/india-business-email-list/)
- [Canada B2B Database](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/canada-business-email-list/)
- [Australia B2B Database](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/australia-business-email-list/)
- [Singapore B2B Database](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/singapore-business-email-list/)
- [UAE Business Database](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/uae-business-email-list/)
- [France B2B Email List](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/france-business-email-list/)
- [Japan B2B Database](https://b2bdataindex.com/data-pages/japan-business-email-list-and-sales-leads-database/)

## City Intelligence Hubs

Real market intelligence for 31 major global business cities:
New York, London, Berlin, Singapore, Mumbai, Tokyo, Dubai, Paris, Sydney, Toronto, and 21 more — available at https://b2bdataindex.com/city/[city-name]/

- Data provider: https://leadsblue.com
- Catalog operator: B2B Data Index Research Team

- All prices USD. CSV format. Instant download after purchase.
- Last updated: 2026-04-24
